programmes.show_description: A young model is lured to a secluded prison where a sadistic matron punishes women for perceived moral failings. Contains nudity and distressing scenes.
4/4. As well as red squirrels, Colin spots signs of a more elusive mammal. The native plants in his meadow begins to take hold, attracting a new host of visitors. Last in series.
August brings the climax of the farming year, and the end of 12 months on the Edwardian Farm for the team. They must harvest their oat crop, but everything depends on the weather.
5/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler battle it out to make the most money. Caroline Hawley, Danny Sebastian and Stu Abbott head to Buxton.

21/35. Charlie and Lee are in Liverpool to design a garden for ski-mad couple David and Michelle and their children.
4/4. As well as red squirrels, Colin spots signs of a more elusive mammal. The native plants in his meadow begins to take hold, attracting a new host of visitors. Last in series.
1/9. Alan Titchmarsh and his team deliver breath-taking gardens to some of Britain's most deserving families. In this episode he travels to Walsall to surprise a young widow.
2/9. Alan Titchmarsh and the make-over-team a flood-wrecked Somerset garden into a picture perfect paradise fit for Hollywood.
3/9. Alan and the team create a spectacular Space Age garden for a war hero and his young family in rural Cornwall.
4/9. Alan Titchmarsh and the team head to Chessington to create a car themed garden with some of the most inventive features they've ever created in the series.
5/9. Alan Titchmarsh and the make-over team create a Bollywood Dream Garden for an extraordinary family with three deaf children.
Simon Templar is on holiday in Naples when he intervenes between an arguing Englishman and Italian. So begins his investigation into mafia crime. Roger Moore stars.
Comedy. A brilliant mother and daughter con team have their grift down to a fine art. Starring Sigourney Weaver, Jennifer Love Hewitt, Gene Hackman and Ray Liotta.
Norfolk-set coming-of-age drama. Mere days before her wedding, an aristocratic girl discovers some hideous truths about the people closest to her. Contains sexual scenes.
Carry On-style comedy curio. A divorced man teaches girls how to swindle rich men - and in return he gets a cut of their takings. Contains nudity and 60s social attitudes.
Simon Templar is on holiday in Naples when he intervenes between an arguing Englishman and Italian. So begins his investigation into mafia crime. Roger Moore stars.
Former police officer, Aaron Carty, swapped his uniform for high heels to perform as Beyonce at UK Black Pride
6/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler battle it out to make the most money. Roo Irvine, Gary Barton and Kevin Paxton head to St Andrews.

22/35. Charlie and Chris are in Shropshire to create an accessible, Italian-inspired garden for Denise and ex-professional footballer John.
1/4. A five-diamond platinum sparkler, Italian marble chimney piece and Tibetan dagger go under the hammer. Will a guitar signed by The Rolling Stones give someone satisfaction?
2/4. A 19th-century Japanese silver punchbowl, a boule table and a John Constable painting go under the hammer. And will a 1930s Philco radio make a sound profit?
3/4. An Egyptian amulet, a silver pin cushion and a collection of timepieces make the auction tick. And will someone be sitting pretty on some Louis XVI gilt chairs?
4/4. A Victorian mirror and some acclaimed works of art go under the hammer. And will an extremely collectable consignment of wine get the auction's juices flowing? Last in series.
A German undercover unit infiltrates British lines during the Dunkirk evacuation. Their mission - sabotage the RAF during the Battle of Britain. Boo! Stars Frederick Stafford.
During the 1922 Turkish Civil War, two American adventurers and a band of mercenaries guard a covert transport through hostile territory. Tony Curtis and Charles Bronson star.
Comedy. A despondent man hires a professional assassin to take himself out. Stars David Jason and Monty Python's Graham Chapman.
Helen Mirren stars as a sex worker who begins an affair with a shady colleague at their high-class London cabaret. Can their relationship survive? Contains sexual scenes.
